title: EphB2-Fc precipitates from rat hippocampal neurons in culture and from brain lysates
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"ea7ju","text":"EphrinBs are transmembrane ligands for the Eph receptor tyrosine kinases. Here we describe the procedure used to precipitate ephrinB signaling complexes from hippocampal neurons in culture or brain lysates using soluble EphB receptor ectodomains fused to Fc portions of human IgG (EphB2-Fc).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Homogenize a murine brain in 2 ml LBA lysis buffer
Spin down at 16,000 g, 10 min, 4 o C
Take supernatans and measure protein concentration.
Incubate 1.5 mg protein with protein-G sepharose beads for 30 min at 4 o C.
Spin samples down at 6,000 g, 5 min, 4 o C.
Incubate overnight at 4 o C these pre-cleared supernatans with protein-G Sepharose beads and 5 μg EphB2-Fc (precipitate) or Fc (control for unspecific protein binding).
Spin them down at 6,000 g, 5 min, 4 o C.
Wash beads three times with HNTG buffer
Add 20 μl Loading buffer
Boil samples for 5 min. Load in a 9% SDS-PAGE gel and develop by Western blot with the desired antibodies.
Stimulation of hippocampal neurons.
Cluster EphB2- Fc or Fc one hour prior stimulation at RT: Mix EphB2-Fc/Fc 1 μg/ml + 1/10 anti-hFc (0.1 μg/ml)
Wash neurons 2 x with HBSS.
Add EphB2-Fc/Fc clusters to pre-warmed NB medium.
Apply to the neurons and incubate at 37 o C for 1 hr
Neuron lysates
Place plates on ice and wash twice with cold PBS.
Lyse cells in PLC buffer; incubate at 4 o C for 10 min; spin down samples at 16,000 g 10 min 4 o C.
Take supernatans and measure protein concentration.
EphB2-Fc precipitation
Incubate 3 mg total protein from the neuron lysates with protein-G Sepharose beads for 1 hr at 4 o C.
Add 10 μg of EphB2-Fc or Fc to the appropriate sample
Incubate overnight at 4 o C.
Spin them down at 6,000 g, 5 min, 4 o C.
Wash beads three times with HNTG buffer
Add 20 μl Loading buffer
Boil samples for 5 min. Resolve in a 7.5% SDS-PAGE gel and develop by Western blot with the desired antibodies.
Hippocampal neuron cultures: 17 days Precipitation: 2 days

<a href="https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/nn1858 ">Grb4 and GIT1 transduce ephrinB reverse signals modulating spine morphogenesis and synapse formation by Segura, I. et al. published in Nature Neuroscience on 31 Jan, 2007 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/nn1858
